sourceMovie.title: Batman Ninja
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Batman Ninja (2018) as a animation theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The animation and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Batman: Bad Blood
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Batman Ninja clicked for you, Batman: Bad Blood (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and action, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Batman Ninja?
faq.answer: Try Batman: Bad Blood, GANTZ:O, Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie—each shares DNA with Batman Ninja while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Batman Ninja?
faq.answer: Batman Ninja (2018) is best described as Animation, Action, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Batman Ninja part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Batman Ninja Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
